title: Elementi Drink Mixer Handheld - Electric Drink Stirrer for Powder Drinks - Protein Powder Mixer Wand & Frother - Hand Frother with Stand (Mint Green)
description:
About this item
UNIVERSAL MIXING AT YOUR FINGERTIPS: Our drink mixer elevates your everyday routine into a mindful ritual. With its high-speed, high torque motor, you can effortlessly whisk your protein shakes, greens powders, or frothy milk in just 15-20 seconds. The perfect powder mixer
RELIABLE QUALITY, UNWAVERING SUPPORT: We honor your trust with a 2-year warranty. If ever you aren't completely delighted, we promise to make it right. Your satisfaction isn't just our commitment, it's our pledge.
UNLEASH YOUR INNER MIXOLOGIST: Embrace the freedom to create a wide range of drinks, from energizing pre-workout shakes to calming matcha lattes and brain-boosting Keto Coffee. Our Elementi mini whisk drink mixer brings café quality versatility to your kitchen, enhancing the flavor and joy in each sip you take.
SIMPLICITY MEETS COMFORT: Crafted with a unique soft-touch ergonomic grip, our frother mixer handheld combines comfort and ease of use into one, making it an indispensable ally in your kitchen. It is a convenient size: 11 inches tall and 2 inches in diameter. (Note: 2xAA batteries not included).
STAND INCLUDED FOR EASY STORAGE: Our drink stirrer comes with a sophisticated stand for easy storage, adding a touch of elegance to your kitchen. Cleaning is a breeze – a simple rinse in hot water and a rest in the stand is all it needs.
reviews_5s:
This is a great frother. You can control the speed by pressing the button. It works great and the price is unbeatable!Great frother! It’s very powerful and mixes my coffee perfectly! I love the stand too. Goes perfectly on my coffee station!!I love how the frother works. It is fast and easy to handle.I had an issue with the product and had a resolution via email within literally 3 minutes. Customer service like this is so rare these days. Product works greatWe use this with every cup of coffee and I even bought one for work. It's such a good price and even though it's battery powered the batteries last a long time...even with multiple uses per day. Blends everything including collagen, butter and whipping cream wonderfully!Nice purchase for an excellent price point. I just looked at it again and it's being shown as 50% off at $9.99. Don't be fooled by that. I got it "full price" for $12.99. But I love it. It's ergonomic and is made of the perfect, grip-friendly material. And this little thing works great. Like many, I use it for foaming non-dairy milk. We all know it's not the same as regular milk, but it does a nice job on both my soy milk and (even better) on my extra creamy oat milk. The reason I wanted it is because, although I have a plug-in, bigger foamer that I got when I ordered my Nespresso machine, this one is a quick use, put it on hot water, and put it away using its handy stand. No cord makes it even better. I used it quite a few times before writing this review.I just used this for the first time for my morning coffee. It literally
took 10 seconds to whip up some half & half for the top of my coffee.
So excited!!
Update: The second time that I used this, I couldn't get the same frothing action.
I was told that I needed to get more air into it, so today I tried more of an up and down
motion, pulling air into it, and wow!!! I had tons of froth and foam. So happy!!!This has become one of my favorite tools in the kitchen! I’ve used it for anything from milk to salad dressings. It’s easy to clean by just running it in a little soapy water and under running water for a quick rinse. Love it and highly recommend!I thought oh great this barely works.....until my husband recommended lithium batteries. BINGO! It works like a dream! I also used clear double stick tape to keep the holder in place on my counter.This hand mixer is amazing it mixes my powder protein coffee in a snap no powder left in shake. it smooths the protein shake out you dont even feel or taste like its powder coffee spins quickly and easy to clean.
reviews_1s:
Worked great until I had to change the battery. The negative connection broke, just as I saw in another review, which rendered the frother useless. Very disappointed.Already stopped working. I tried new batteries and no luck. I also didn’t like how fast it spun it caused a big mess! I had a much better one from jade leaf matcha and will buy another from there. This one lasted maybe a monthThis product does not work. It does not froth. Unfortunately I have thrown the bag away so I am unable to return it. Can you help?I returned this. Although the package and advertising is nice, it doesn't work for all the things it advertises. I make bulletproof coffee every day with MCT oil, ghee, salt, and cinnamon, but this blender barely spins the liquid around, doesn't mix well and creates almost no froth at all. With that said, it DOES a good job frothing milk - that is just milk with nothing else in the glass. With a tiny vibrating coil, I should have known better. What I ended up using that works great (and I already had in my kitchen) is a Vintage Braun 4172B Immersion Hand Held Electric Blender/Mixer. It actually has a small rotating blade that works fantastic. You can find used one on Ebay or buy the newer and more expensive model on Amazon. I do have to use a bigger "glass" to mix in, but that is no problem as I have quite a few mason type jars that do the job. If all you want to do is froth milk then buy this, but if you actually want to MIX something, then I wouldn't buy this. Also, the power button is awkward to hold on to while using and cramps my thumb.
Don't recommend at all. Would not buy again.Never have I ever bought something from Amazon that broke after two uses!! I even changed the batteries then flipped the batteries just in case. That didn’t work either. Seems like I got a broken one. So buyer beware…. It could happen to you to! Junk for me! I would have given it 0 stars.Love love love this thing. Why am I so late on it?!, for some reason, my coffee taste soooo much better than mixing with a spoon.

UPDATE!: it’s been a month since I’ve had this product and I still feel the same as my original review BUT there’s been a few times so far where it would just stop working. That is with new batteries. Now I’ve noticed, taking the batteries out and putting them back in helps and it’ll starts working again but who wants to have to do that every so often. If the batteries need to be replaced then that is one thing but just to get it to work properly, no. I am a bit disappointed and may repurchase this item elsewhere.

UPDATE AFTER THE UPDATE: it completely stopped working. Only had it a monthThis drink mixer is junk, barely stirs water, let alone anything that is thicker.Item broke in about 1 month. We bought this item on July 12 and it was delivered on July 16. The return window closed on August 16 and it broke on August 18. We have tried everything to get it working again. I would not recommend buying this item. Sent message to company and heard nothing back.Worked great for the first three days and just...stopped working. I changed the batteries and used two different brands of AA batteries but still nothing. Would NOT recommend.Always a risk buying this cheap made in China junk. The last one I got lasted a good 6 months. This one died in two weeks. Not exactly durable. At least I got it on sale.
